html:
Exclusive to:

Moon Moth Wings are a Food item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are dropped by Moon Moths and take 6 Days to spoil.

Tips

  • As it is much easier to obtain Butterfly Wings, it is recommended to eat Moon Moth Wings raw rather than cooking them.
    • But Moon Moth Wings can be used in the Crock Pot to substitute Butterfly Wings in the recipe for Butter Muffins for improved healing at the cost of sanity.

Trivia

  • Moon Moth Wings were introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

recipes.note: Filler cannot be Meats or Mandrake .

Moon Moth Wings are a Food item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are dropped by Moon Moths and take 6 Days to spoil.
Usage[edit | edit source]
×10
Only during Hallowed Nights event
×2
Filler cannot be Meats or Mandrake.
×2
×2
×4
Tips[edit | edit source]
As it is much easier to obtain Butterfly Wings, it is recommended to eat Moon Moth Wings raw rather than cooking them.
But Moon Moth Wings can be used in the Crock Pot to substitute Butterfly Wings in the recipe for Butter Muffins for improved healing at the cost of sanity.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Moon Moth Wings were introduced in the Turn of Tides update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cánh Bướm Đêm là một Thực Phẩm độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Chúng bị Bướm đêm đánh rơi và mất 6 ngày để hư hỏng.

'''Moon Moth Wings''' are a [[Food]] [[item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. They are dropped by [[Moon Moth]]s and take 6 [[Day]]s to spoil.
== {{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Moon Moth Wings
|item2 = Lune Tree Blossom
|item3 = Sanity Decrease
|count3 = 10
|tool = Mad Scientist Lab
|result = Lunar Experiment
|note = Only during [[Hallowed Nights]] event
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Moon Moth Wings
|item2 = Vegetables
|item3 = Filler
|count3 = 2
|result = Butter Muffin
|tool = Crock Pot
|note = Filler cannot be [[Meats]] or [[Mandrake]].
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Moon Moth Wings
|item2 = Papyrus
|item3 = Feather Pencil
|result = Clear Minded Cadenza
|character = Wigfrid
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Moon Moth Wings
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Papyrus
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Iridescent Gem
|tool = Bookcase
|result = Lunar Grimoire
|character = Wickerbottom}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Moon Moth Wings
|item2 = Mourning Glory
|count2 = 4
|result = Moon Moth
|character = Wendy
|skill = Mourning Glory I
}}
== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* As it is much easier to obtain [[Butterfly Wings]], it is recommended to eat Moon Moth Wings raw rather than cooking them.
** But Moon Moth Wings can be used in the [[Crock Pot]] to substitute Butterfly Wings in the recipe for [[Butter Muffin]]s for improved healing at the cost of sanity.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Moon Moth Wings were introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Turn of Tides|Turn of Tides]]'' update.
